case_title: AOAY, CARMELITA VS MIRA, MANUEL DANILO et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT MIRA, JOSE H.
CERTIFIED MAIL TO MANUEL DANILO MIRA RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-11-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-14-2006 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MIRA, MANUEL DANILO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY AOAY, CARMELITA AS TO DEFENDANT MIRA, MANUEL DANILO MIRA, JOSE H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED SENT TO JOSE H. MIRA

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-11-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-03-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 10/3/06 AT 1:30 P.M. DEFT. MIRA TO OBTAIN INTERPRETER AND RETURN TO COURT ON THE CONTINUED DATE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AOAY, CARMELITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIRA, MANUEL DANILO $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,595.00, JOSE MIRA DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AUG. 17, 2006. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
